title: Smooth Drawers
description: Modernized textures for the Storage Drawers Mod
body:
# Smooth Drawers

This simple retexture modernizes the textures in the Storage Drawers mod to be up-to-par with the new Jappa 1.14+ look.
 

Supported Versions
- 1.21.1
- 1.20.1
- 1.19
- 1.18
- 1.16
- 1.12
